title: Engagement Party
description: Complete multimedia coverage of Celine & Khaled’s engagement celebration, executed with a clear creative direction. The objective was a retro-inspired visual language, focused on atmosphere, authentic emotion, and candid moments. Through a mix of photo and video, we documented the energy of the night, the details, and the spontaneous interactions that define truly unforgettable moments—preserving not just how the event looked, but how it felt.

title: V Parfumes
description: For V Parfumes, we produced two premium short-form videos showcasing how the brand’s perfumes integrate seamlessly into the Dubai lifestyle, using cinematic storytelling and luxury visuals. Alongside this, we delivered a professional social media photoshoot, creating a high-quality content library that strengthens brand positioning and ensures consistent, polished communication across platforms.

title: Deep Desert Experience
description: We spent two days in the Dubai desert capturing a boutique driving experience designed for true automotive enthusiasts—far beyond a typical tour or safari. Our focus was on experiential storytelling: cinematic driving shots, atmospheric desert visuals, and premium lifestyle moments that highlight the exclusivity, emotion, and refinement of the journey. The final deliverables formed a cohesive high-end visual narrative that positions the experience as exceptional, intimate, and built for a discerning audience.

title: Hyundai MEA
description: For Hyundai Middle East & Africa we handled the full multimedia coverage of their regional event. We took care of the entire photo and video workflow—capturing key moments, the atmosphere on-site, and the premium brand direction Hyundai is building across the region.

title: Gohuos Watches
description: We executed both studio and outdoor photo and video production for UGC (User-Generated Content) creation, collaborating with the Swiss luxury watch brand Gohous Watches. The goal was to produce authentic yet premium visual assets that reflect the brand’s elegance, craftsmanship, and lifestyle appeal across various digital platforms.

title: Mentor Effect
description: We managed the complete technical execution of the Mentor Effect podcast, proudly sponsored by Red Bull. Throughout Season 1, we filmed seven episodes featuring top sports experts, handled professional photography, and developed the podcast’s entire visual and graphic identity, ensuring a cohesive and dynamic brand presence across all media platforms.

title: GT Collection
description: we produced a series of 20 short-form videos as part of a two-month branding and paid advertising campaign designed to elevate the brand’s digital presence. In addition to video production, we captured high-quality imagery optimized for use across banners, website visuals, LinkedIn, and video thumbnails, ensuring consistent and premium visual communication across all platforms.

title: Sprintray Presentation
description: We provided full multimedia coverage — both photo and video — for an exclusive dental innovation event showcasing the future of dentistry through 3D printing. The spotlight was on SprintRay machines, demonstrating cutting-edge technology that’s redefining precision, speed, and patient experience in modern dental practices.

title: Dr. Strah
description: We produced 20 short-form educational reels for Dr. Strah’s clinic to raise awareness about women’s health and common gynecological issues. The campaign reached over 200,000 organic views, boosting trust and visibility for the clinic.

title: Tin Pavlic
description: For Tin Pavlic, a sports performance and endurance coach, we created short-form videos for social media to showcase his expertise in strength, mobility, and injury prevention. The goal was to attract high-profile clients for 1-on-1 coaching. We handled the full production — from concept to post — to position Tin as a trusted authority in performance training.

title: Minea Gavran Liconga
description: For Dr. Minea Gavran Liconga, a respected dental professional in Slovenia, we developed a content strategy focused on educating the public about oral hygiene in a relatable and engaging way. Our team handled the full production cycle – from planning and scripting to filming and post-production – to create short-form video content for her social media and website. The videos aim to simplify complex dental topics and position Dr. Gavran as a trusted voice in dental health.

title: Jerry & Lucka
description: While I usually don’t work for free, some moments are priceless. As a pre-wedding gift for a close friend – the first in our group to get engaged – I organized and shot a styled engagement photoshoot for him and his future wife. This project was all about capturing authentic emotions, intimacy, and the beginning of a lifelong journey through timeless visuals. A personal project, created from the heart.

title: Luka's Den
description: For Luka Nebec’s premium barbershop brand Luka’s Den, we developed and executed a complete social media strategy focused on personal branding and storytelling. Our team handled everything from concept development, filming, and video editing to full profile management. The goal was to position Luka as more than just a barber – a modern gentleman's guide – through consistent, stylish, and engaging content across platforms.

title: Lunnora by GT
description: We led the full brand establishment of Lunnora by GT in Dubai, introducing the brand to the UAE market across major e-commerce platforms including Amazon UAE, Noon, and Tamara. Our scope included developing brand identity, creating high-converting website and social media content, designing graphic assets, and managing paid advertising campaigns. From strategy to execution, we ensured a cohesive and impactful market entry.

title: White Clinic
description: Located in the heart of Dubai, abreast of the picturesque The Palm, WHITE Clinic offers a comprehensive selection of specialized non-invasive aesthetic treatments for both women and men.

title: Tim Marovt - AD Marathon
description:
As part of a creative collaboration with athlete and influencer Tim Marovt, I captured a series of visuals during the Abu Dhabi Marathon 2024, highlighting the energy, emotion, and atmosphere of the event. 

📸 Highlight: One of the photos from this project was featured in the Los Angeles Times, a globally recognized news outlet with over 25 million monthly readers.

title: Rotana Star
description: Behind the scenes filming Social Media Content for Luxury rent a car. Rotana Star Rent A Car offers a diverse fleet that includes luxury brands such as Ferrari, Lamborghini, BMW, Audi, McLaren, Mercedes, Rolls Royce, Porsche, Range Rover, and Bentley.

title: Global Blockchain
description: Global Blockchain Show in Dubai on 12 & 13 December 2024.

title: Firetti Contemporary
description: Firetti Contemporary is a gallery where art and creative concepts align from the region and beyond, encouraging global engagement through creating meaningful and sustainable collections.

title: Global Stratalogues
description: The Global Stratalogues is an exclusive series of high-level, closed-door roundtables and dinners that convene policymakers, private sector leaders, and academic experts from diverse disciplines in a think tank-style environment.

title: Dental Clinic Gavran
description: Collaborated with Dental Clinic Gavran to create engaging short-form video content for their social media platforms and capture high-quality professional photos.

title: Mateo & C5
description: Mateo, a professional martial arts competitor, sought to secure new sponsorship contracts to support his career. We provided high-quality content tailored for potential sponsors, effectively showcasing his athleticism, dedication, and brand value. This pro bono project exemplifies our commitment to empowering athletes with compelling visual storytelling that enhances their professional opportunities.

title: Sara Lemma
description: Ethiopian Restaurant  with traditional coffee and food offering real cultural experience.

title: Wadi Dafta Plantation
description: Wadi Dafta Plantation – a tranquil oasis blending lush landscapes with authentic local charm

title: Al matiya Investment
description: Proud to be part of a historic moment! Our team attended an event where FC Barcelona joined forces, and the official launch date for the Al-Matiya Investment & Business Forum 2025 was announced.

title: Nova Luxury Cars
description: Nova Luxury Cars stands as the ultimate destination for luxury car enthusiasts in the UAE. They take immense pride in offering a wide selection of exquisite vehicles from renowned brands such as Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Rolls Royce, Mercedes, Land Rover and many more.

title: Business Forum 2024
description: Emirates Turkish Business Forum 2024 Under the Patronage and Presence of Sheikh Dr. Saeed bin Tahnoon Al Nahyan.

title: Martin Strel
description: A photoshoot with Slovenian marathon swimmer and 5 times Guinness world record holder - Martin Strel. The images will be used for Socials and templates for Banners and other media material.

title: Voyage
description: During an event hosted by Mercator, I had the opportunity to photograph a memorable launch by a prominent Serbian rapper who introduced his ice tea brand, "Volim Tea." The vibrant atmosphere and dynamic crowd interactions were captured through my lens, highlighting the excitement surrounding the new product and the artist's engagement with his fans.

title: Optiform.fit
description: OptiForm is an online platform where you have courses that will improve your health. This project lasted more than half a year where we recorded +100 video lessons and +30 podcasts.

title: Gasper Rifelj
description: concert by Gsšper Rifelj at the renowned "Izvir Cvicka." The event was a unique blend of music and cultural heritage, set against the picturesque backdrop of the famous wine spring.

title: Conference on AI
description: We attend the Global Conference on AI and Human Rights at the University of Law! We were honored to assist with media coverage for the event, which saw attendees from all seven continents, from Japan to South Africa. The conference brought together leading experts and passionate advocates to discuss the critical intersection of artificial intelligence and human rights. It was inspiring to witness and document the dynamic discussions, innovative ideas, and powerful messages shared throughout the event.

title: 24h - X Challenge
description:
The 24-hour challenge, inspired by military training, pushes participants to their physical and mental limits. The experience includes walking 45 km with a 25 kg backpack, climbing, rafting, and various other demanding activities. This extreme environment fosters valuable skills such as teamwork, discipline, and resilience.

Documenting this event was an intense undertaking. Our team had to carry video equipment over 20 km while navigating the same tough conditions. Additionally, we managed all this on just 3 hours of sleep. The result, however, is a raw and authentic portrayal of human endurance and camaraderie.

title: Race Taxi
description: During our marketing campaign with Race Taxi, we created a vlog showcasing the exhilarating experience of driving an R8 on a race track at speeds exceeding 260 km/h.

title: Pound Pain
description: On a quiet Sunday evening, I received an unexpected call from the USA. They needed a presentation video created from scratch within just three days. The urgency and challenge were clear, but we jumped into action without hesitation. Late nights and early mornings followed as we brainstormed and edited at a breakneck pace. By Wednesday, we had transformed their vision into a polished, engaging video. Exhausted but exhilarated, we delivered the final product on time, feeling incredibly proud of what we had achieved in such a short span. The client's satisfaction was the ultimate reward, affirming our dedication and teamwork.

title: Fitweek
description: Where the world of sailing, healthy living and fun come together!

title: Miran Rudan & IPF
description: V sodelovanju z Miranom Rudanom, brivnico Underground Barber in IPF, smo prikazali pomembnost glasbe pri brivcih in frizerskih salonih.

title: Avtomotodrom Grobnik
description: Race day with Andraz Kavka on Avtomotodrom Grobnik. A day full of fun and adrenaline.

title: Neisha & IPF
description: V okviru sodelovanja z Neisho, Cigar Lounge in IPF smo prikazali kako pomembna je glasba v restavracijah.

title: Nipke & IPF
description: V okviru sodelovanja z Bošjanom Nipičem - Nipketom, Grosbasket in IPF smo prikazali kako pomembna je glasba v trgovinah.

title: 16. Koncert ULMF
description: Koncert Medicinske fakultete Univerze v Ljubljani je najpomembnejsi zabavni dogodek leta na Medicinski fakulteti Univerze v Ljubljani.

title: MUN LAWs
description: The MUNLawS is the largest university-level conference in Slovenia. This three-day event is aimed at university, secondary school students, and young professionals. It takes place each year in Autumn at the Faculty of Law, University of Ljubljana, Slovenia. Our previous ten conferences were attended by more than 1 000 delegates from more than 40 countries and 4 continents. The MUNLawS presents a great opportunity to engage in diplomatic debates about current topics in the international community. Organised in the beautiful city of Ljubljana, the Conference is also an amazing occasion to build friendships and to enjoy our city’s lively social life.

title: Gucci & Party Bus - Vlog #14
description:
Istanbul is a stunning city with an abundance of historical sites and cultures. But it also sends a lot of other messages. What does money really mean when it comes to clothing, food, and daily water? It's a great example of how, in our society, we frequently take for granted the luxury of having a regular work and not having to actively struggle to survive.

Moreover, it's a city that offers leisure and fun. You might argue that it's a great place to explore and shop during the day, and it becomes a huge party at night. People from various walks of life congregate at pubs, clubs, and restaurants, young and old.

title: Placan da potujes // Vlog #12
description: Location scouting je postopek iskanja in izbiranja lokacij za snemanje filma, televizijskega programa, oglasevalskega projekta ali drugega medijskega dogodka. Gre za kljucen korak v pripravah na produkcijo, saj ima izbira prave lokacije pomemben vpliv na celoten vizualni izgled in vzdusje projekta.

title: OneLife Rally
description: I was a photographer in 7 days event which was in Rome-Milano-Venice-Zagreb-Novi Sad-Sibiu and Bucharest. It was an honor for me to participate in one of the biggest car events in Europe - One Life Rally.

title: Kamnolom Skrivnosti
description: Dogodek se je odvijal v sklopu Festival kamna v kamnolomu v Lipici. Poleg modne revije smo posneli tudi Behind the scenes, kako so potekale priprave na dogodek.

title: Warrior Challenge
description: AskUros Mentorship 2.0 had some sort of military training called X or Warrior Challenge. Participants was pushed to their physical, mental and emotional limits.

title: USA Vlog #11
description: Travel in USA to visit Uros Ceglaj. We have been in Texas - San Antionio, Atlanta, Las Vegas and Tampa - Florida

title: Cistilna akcija in suppanje
description: S skupnimi mocmi smo v sklopu AskUros Mentorshipa 2.0 ocistili reko Vipavo z okolico in pospravili kar 276 kg smeti!

title: Istanbul - Vlog #13
description: Turčija je znana po Kebabih... Pa so res dobri? Kako izgledajo muslimanska stranišča? Kako sladoledarji zajbavajo in druge dogodivščine potepanja po Turčiji v razširjeni vlogerski zasedbi.

title: Dubai Vlog #8
description: Vacation with Uroš Čeglaj in Dubai, doing crazy things... Check it out!

title: Malta - Vlog #5 & #6
description: Mala drzava, sestavljena iz treh manjsih otokov, znana po lepih plazah, puncah in zabavah. Poleg tega ponuja se ogromno drugega. Od zelo prijaznih in odkritih ljudi, zelo zanimive zgodovine,  prelepe arhitekture in zelo okusne hrane. Ceprav sva sla tja novembra, sva ugotovila da je tudi takrat vec kot odlična destinacija za pocitnice. Dobrodosli na Malti!

title: 15. Koncert ULMF
description: Probably the biggest project i took a lead in 2022. It was a great challenge to organize everything for video and photo production. Thanks, Leo Mikuš and Tevž Smolnikar for being camera operators and Boštjan Podlogar for the photos.

title: Ansambel Zazur
description: recording a videospot for slovenian ansambel Zazur.

title: Podlipnik apartments
description: A photoshoot of  apartments in Kranjska Gora for booking and social media in cooperation with Tilen Bozic.

title: Prague - Vlog #4
description: Pa pojdimo še v Prago. Najina zadnja a ne končna destinacija. Mesto bogato s kulturo, arhitekturo in zgodovino; prav tako pa poznano po odličnem pivu. S pomočjo prijatelja iz Češke skupaj preverimo, če vse to res drži!

title: Miklavzev sejem
description: Project in Ilirska Bistrica in cooperation with video2go and Visit Ilirska Bistrica.

description: MunLaws Slovenia which is a simulation of United Nations, organized an event on Pravna Fakulteta

title: Martinovanje - Nastja Gabor
description: Martinovanje with a singer Nastja Gabor and band. The event took place in the Bled Rose hotel.

title: Firefighters
description: Being a firefighter and helping people is one thing but when I'm not on duty, I can contribute to my voluntary fire brigade with my photography skills.

title: Bratislava - Vlog #2
description: In zgodba se nadaljuje. Po štirih prelepih dneh na Dunaju sva se odpravila proti najini drugi destinaciji; Bratislavi. S kom sva se družila? Kako američani in kako angleži rečejo plastenki vode? In kaj se je Tilen naučil o avtih? Skočite z nama v čarobno glavno mesto Slovaške!

title: Night Strike Krsko
description: Car drift event, organized by 32nd Drift Squadron.

description: First part of interrail travel with Tilen Božič where we visited the oldest ZOO in the world and saw other amazing thing. Check it out!

description: Produce a movie from a scratch in only 60 hours? Sounds like mission impossible. But a group of ex-schoolmates can do it. Here is our product.

description: Volleyball World Championship 2022. Slovenia lost against France with a final score 2 -3.

description: One Life Rally stopped in Ljubljana and I get a chance to take some photos of these astonishing supercars!

description: Statehood Day at Vransko summer night, party territory with Luka Basi and Ines Erbus. Project in cooperation with Boštjan Podlogar.

title: Polident Team Building
description: I receivede last minute call to go in Primorska region to shoot team building. It was something new for me to capture dance class but overall it was fun experience.

title: Mura - Maribor
description: The last game of Slovenian national championship 2022. Maribor won it for the sixteenth time.

title: Red bull Goni Poni
description: Being part of the Red Bull video team is something amazing. Great day and great experience

description: Documenting traditional University of Ljubljana Faculty of Medicine picnic with colleague Tilen Božič. The main performers were Big Band and Maja Keuc.

title: Vipava Rally (Day 2)
description: Second day on Vipava Rally. In the morning the weather was nice but it started raining in the afternoon. However, it was a great experience being a part of it.

description: At the end of March Mark Dobrilovic and I went to Idrija and participate first in a basketball match and then at after-party. Another awesome project with What's up Idrija.

description: At the end of March I was invited to a basketball match and here are some results...

title: Santorini
description: In the summer 2021, it was the peak of the corona pandemic, we decided to go on Greece island called Santorini and enjoying there for a week. Here is a short aftermovie.

title: Zelenica Ski Ride
description: National Ski mountaineering championship 2022 on Zelenica. Weather conditions were pretty rough, it was really cold and windy. We tried flying with FPV drone bit unfortunately we manage to record only one clip with it. Big thanks to Luka Vovk Vižintin and Vid Mušič for help.

title: Pustna Sabuta
description: After long time, clubs were opened again and I'm really happy that I got a chance to participate on the event Pustna Sabuta which was organised by What's Up Idrija. Project was in cooperation with Vid Mušič.

description: Presenting slovenian creator and its work - 3 dresses, which represent river Soca, kras and sea. Video was filmed in Tolmin, Stanjel and Piran.
